name: HIKEN SUZUME KENJUTSU: KANGOROSHIYA (SECRET SPARROW SWORD ART: CUNNING KILLER STANCE)

description.value:
The Kangoroshiya is the result of studying the weak points in his first stance and improving upon its effects, focusing the user's killing intent to a fine edge that allows him to avoid blows and return with a deadly riposte. This stance functions exactly as Fuku Ejiki except as noted above and below. Kangoroshiya improves upon the user's reflexes and lures foes into striking points that only appear to be unguarded.

Enemies striking the user only apply half their Strength modifier to the damage roll, and static bonuses to damage (such as Power Attack) are halved. In addition, if an attacker misses the user, he may immediately make an attack of opportunity. This does not allow the user to make more attacks of opportunity than he is allowed per round.

Requires: Dodge (f), Combat Reflexes (f), and Fuku Ejiki (5)

Material Focus: Bladed weapon

Mastery: At the 1st, 3rd, and 5th levels of mastery in this technique the user may apply the bonus to defense against an additional opponent. Other effects that apply to the target of the user's Dodge feat only apply to the first target.
